Source: Azure OpenAI What's New
URL: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/ai-services/openai/whats-new
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Azure OpenAI What's New (Azure AI Foundry)

Note: URL now redirects to /azure/foundry-classic/openai/whats-new — page rebranded to "Microsoft Foundry (classic)"

## February 2026
- GPT-Realtime-1.5 and GPT-Audio-1.5 models released
- Improved instruction following, multi-lingual support, and tool calling

## December 2025
- GPT-image-1.5 model available (limited access)
- gpt-4o-mini-transcribe-2025-12-15: 50% lower WER than previous
- gpt-realtime-mini-2025-12-15: feature parity with full gpt-realtime
- gpt-4o-mini-tts-2025-12-15: improved multilingual speech synthesis

## October 2025
- Realtime API SIP support for telephony
- gpt-4o-transcribe-diarize ASR model released
- GPT-image-1-mini for global deployments
- PII detection content filter

## September 2025
- GPT-5-codex available (limited access)
- Sora video-to-video support

## August 2025
- Sora image-to-video support (Sweden Central, East US 2)
- Realtime API audio model GA
- Provisioned spillover GA
- GPT-5, GPT-5-mini, GPT-5-nano, GPT-5-chat models available
- Model router with GPT-5 support

## July 2025
- GPT-image-1 update with input fidelity and partial streaming

## June 2025
- codex-mini and o3-pro released

## May 2025
- Sora video generation (preview)
- Spotlighting for prompt shields (preview)
- Model router (preview)

## April 2025
- Realtime API WebRTC support
- GPT-image-1 released (preview, limited access)
- o4-mini and o3 models released
- GPT-4.1 and GPT-4.1-nano released (1M token context)
- gpt-4o audio models released

## March 2025
- Responses API & computer-use-preview model
- Provisioned spillover (preview)
- Content filtering per-request configuration

## February 2025
- GPT-4.5 Preview
- Stored completions API
- o3-mini data zone standard deployments
- gpt-4o mini audio released

## January 2025
- o3-mini released
- GPT-4o audio completions
- GPT Realtime API 2024-12-17

## December 2024
- o1 reasoning model (limited access)
- Preference fine-tuning (DPO) preview
- Stored completions & distillation
- GPT-4o 2024-11-20
- Data zone provisioned deployment type
